summary: Template spine: Haaland + Salah. Haaland is non-negotiable must-own AND must-captain (EO ~120%+). Gabriel is fading template — acceptable to exit. Best differentials: Rogers (4.1%, max leverage) and Mateta (6.8%). Mbeumo (14.2%) is higher-floor near-differential with set-piece/pen upside.
